name: Composable Skill Router and Progressive Disclosure
objective: Define explicit-only, model-eligible, and router categories with progressive disclosure without implicit permission escalation.
non_goals: No automatic invocation, install, download, update, permission grant, or execution.
inputs: Future local capability inventory and customer-approved trigger contract.
outputs: Future recommendation-only route decision and disclosure plan.
excluded_patterns: Skill creation and any automatic invocation remain outside this router contract.
known_gaps: The proposal is locked and has no true routing evaluation or supported platform-field claim.
